exemplar.title: How can we distinguish between knowledge, belief and opinion?

detailedExemplarData.title: How can we distinguish between knowledge, belief and opinion?

strengths: Clear identification of three specific personal objects with their real-world contexts
Many points are supported by appropriate examples and evidence, demonstrating solid links to the IA prompt
Strong illustrative example linking scientific evidence (muon-decay) to the concept of accepted knowledge
Effective personalization of examples through named objects and personal narrative
weaknesses: Analysis is often descriptive and binary, lacking depth in exploring TOK complexities of verification and methodology
Occasional repetition of similar points across the three objects reduces distinctiveness
Concluding statements are overly simplistic, with limited discussion of degrees of certainty
Insufficient explicit referencing back to the exact wording of the IA prompt throughout
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets the descriptors for the 5â6 band: it clearly identifies three objects in real-world contexts, explains links to the selected IA prompt, and justifies each object with generally appropriate evidence. Strengths include concrete examples and personalized narratives. However, the analysis lacks the precision, nuance and critical depth required for higher bands, sometimes lapsing into oversimplification and repetition. These considerations align with a band 5â6 performance and justify the final score of 6.

annotations.comment: The clear header precisely identifies the first object and its real-world context, strengthening the exhibitionâs concrete grounding.
The discussion of muon-decay experiments is a strong example linking repeatable evidence to the characterization of scientific knowledge.
Explore the criteria by which experimental results become accepted knowledge to deepen your TOK analysis of verification.
The concluding statement is overly simplistic; consider discussing degrees of certainty rather than stating a binary distinction.
The caption precisely frames the certificateâs significance in its real-world religious context, anchoring the belief example.
Selecting an actual physics textbook as a personally used item lends authenticity and specificity to the exhibition.
The introductory description of the textbook is largely descriptive and lacks an explicit link to the prompt; weave in the distinction between knowledge, belief and opinion here.
Deepen the analysis by discussing the limitations and assumptions of experimental verificationâhow do they shape the boundary between provisional belief and accepted knowledge?
Restating the IA prompt in the conclusion can improve cohesion and explicitly tie each object back to the overarching question.
Citing specific chapters or page numbers when referring to the textbook would strengthen evidence and credibility.
Discuss the design and symbolism of the certificate image to enrich how belief is visually represented.
The claim that religious belief lacks any evidence oversimplifies faithâs epistemic roleâconsider acknowledging how believers interpret personal experiences as evidence.
Incorporate perspectives from theology or philosophy to nuance your definition of belief and support your justification.
The personal narrative about shifting from inherited belief to atheism effectively illustrates how belief can evolve.
The assertion that belief cannot be proven is too absolute; explore the spectrum of evidential support within different belief systems.
Explicitly link this summary sentence back to the IA prompt to close the analytical loop and reinforce relevance.
Including a brief case study of a religious conversion could add depth to your exploration of belief.
The object header for the red lipstick is concise and clearly frames the focus on opinion.
The photograph of the lipstick personalizes the opinion example, making the scenario more vivid and engaging.
Consider comparing these subjective responses to broader social norms or beauty standards to enrich your analysis.
The statement on verifiability of opinions oversimplifies subjectivity; explore how some opinions may be supported by intersubjective agreement.
The final sentence appears truncated; ensure the conclusion fully justifies the objectâs relevance to opinion.
The contextual detail about speakersâ backgrounds effectively shows how opinions are rooted in personal experience.
Analyze how cultural frameworks and values influence the perceived reliability of different opinions to deepen your discussion.
The summary sentence reiterates your point but could be expanded to reflect on how opinion interacts with belief and knowledge.
Overall, the exhibition sometimes repeats similar points across objects; aim for distinctive insights to avoid redundancy.

strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
